case_title: CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. ASHWIN NANDA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYEES  FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NANDA, ASHWIN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ASHWIN NANDA DDS NANDA, DR $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NANDA, ASHWIN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ASHWIN NANDA DDS NANDA, DR

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $184.58 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $118.18 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYEES  FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA
